title: Remove obsolete DepSet from output file names
body:
I realized this is functionally dead code while hacking on something. It also means that we lost the ccache advantage in "incremental" builds when the emitted PCH file was introduced. Theoretically we could emit a separate PCH for each unique dependency set to aid ccache again, but that was never very robust, nor have we received any complaints, so I think we can just remove this.

---

Since the introduction of the use of a pre-compiled header, the dependency set based file splitting served no function. Every file includes the pch.h file, which includes the Sysm.h file, which includes all module headers, so effectively all headers are always included in the implementation cpp files.

Remove the now no-op logic to gather dependency sets, and remove the DepSet_hash substrings from output file names.
